## Meeting Purpose

Discuss the Content Operations Specialist role at Matthew's company with candidate Tamara Lužajić.

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role requires deep content quality evaluation skills + ability to articulate issues for workflow improvement](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - Company builds AI-powered content pipelines, customized per client with detailed artifacts/guidelines
  - Emphasis on human-AI collaboration: 80-90% of time ideally spent on high-value creative work
  - Candidate shows enthusiasm and relevant experience, though some aspects (e.g. workflow automation) are new

## Topics

### Role Overview and Expectations

  - [Evaluate content quality instinctively and articulate specific issues](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Manipulate inputs/workflows to improve AI-generated outputs](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Act as "instructor/editor/engineer" for the AI writing system](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Articulate nuanced problems to drive product/engineering improvements](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Balance between content creation skills and technical/analytical abilities](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Company's Content Generation Process

  - [Uses AI-powered pipelines with human intervention points](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Workflow: Topic input → Brief → Research → Outline → Draft → Fact-checking/Images](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Customized per client using detailed artifacts (company context, personas, guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Generates 400-500 content pieces weekly across \~40 clients](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Candidate's Relevant Experience

  - [Used Surfer SEO's AI tool "Surfy" for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Encountered and resolved issues with AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Learned importance of clear, context-rich instructions for AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Familiar with simpler workflow tools like Orbit Flow](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Fast-paced startup atmosphere with constant learning](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Close feedback loop between content ops team (users) and product development](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Emphasis on quickly addressing and fixing product issues](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

### Discussion of AI Tools and Industry

  - [Compared company's system to other tools (e.g. Orbit Flow, N8N, make.com)](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
  - [Touched on indexing/publishing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Brief mention of Matthew's background as TechCrunch editor-in-chief](https://fathom.video/share/4GSbjUmEUmLQbJ5CbDe2B7yj9tsXYGzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marilia to coordinate next steps in the hiring process
  - Team to evaluate Tamara's fit for the role
  - Potential follow-up discussions or interviews to be scheduled
